text: Ship operators involved in Baltimore bridge collapse charged with misconduct and obstruction - NBC News
fullText: The Justice Department brought 18 charges against the operators and a manager relating to a 2024 collision with the Francis Scott Key Bridge that killed six people.

text: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war - BBC
fullText: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

text: Ukraine officials say Zelenskyy’s ex-chief of staff is a suspect in a money-laundering probe - AP News
fullText: Two national agencies fighting corruption in Ukraine have named Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy’s former chief of staff as an official suspect in a major graft investigation. They say Zelenskyy is not under suspicion in the case. The agencies announce…

text: 'American Idol' reveals winner – See if Keyla, Hannah or Jordan won - USA Today
fullText: "American Idol" Top 3 finalist Hannah Harper became the first female country artist to win since Carrie Underwood. See photos of her crowning moment.

text: The Nancy Guthrie investigation could hang on a strand of DNA - CBS News
fullText: A strand of DNA. An eerie doorbell video. The investigation into Nancy Guthrie's disappearance reaches 100th day with no sign of a breakthrough.

text: Mayor of Californian city Eileen Wang resigns over Chinese agent charge - BBC
fullText: Eileen Wang could face up to 10 years in prison following the Department of Justice allegations.

text: UK’s Starmer defiant as calls for his resignation grow and a minister quits - AP News
fullText: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has told his Cabinet he has no intention of resigning, despite growing calls within his Labour Party for him to step down. On Tuesday, several junior ministers resigned, urging a change in leadership. Around 80 Labour lawmaker…

text: Global Experts Establish New Name for PCOS to Reflect Multisystem Disease - CU Anschutz newsroom
fullText: Global Experts Establish New Name for PCOS to Reflect Multisystem Disease

text: NASA leadership shakeup could impact future launch operations at Wallops Island - Shore Daily News
fullText: NASA has appointed former chief of staff Brian Hughes as senior director of launch operations, a newly created role that will oversee launch operations at both the Kennedy Space Center in Florida and the Wallops Flight Facility on Virginia’s Eastern Shore. Th…

text: Trump heads to China today for high-stakes meeting with Xi - CBS News
fullText: Trade, Taiwan and tensions with Iran are surefire topics for President Trump's meeting with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

text: David Rooney’s Must-See Cannes Movies - The Hollywood Reporter
fullText: THR’s chief film critic highlights promising competition entries from some of world cinema’s most highly regarded directors.

text: AI-assisted hacking is already here, Google warns - Axios
fullText: Researchers have found the first known case of cybercriminals using AI to exploit a zero-day flaw.

text: She's trying to outrun pancreatic cancer. Breakthrough treatments give her hope - NPR
fullText: Pancreatic cancer is notoriously lethal. But new treatments mean that may be changing, and people with the disease now have more reason to hope than ever before.

text: As Republicans carve up Black districts, Democrats pivot to a new midterm message - Politico
fullText: Democrats will be unable to respond to the GOP’s redistricting gains before the November elections, and are now turning the mapmaking fight into a political messaging battle.

text: Stephen Colbert and late night hosts strike again as his show nears finale - NPR
fullText: Stephen Colbert invited his "best television friends," fellow late night hosts John Oliver, Seth Meyers and the two Jimmies— Kimmel and Fallon— to join him, as his final show on CBS is set for May 21.
